zh.lifeSummary: 當John Brancestre於大約1315年出生在英國奧可福爾艾普維爾時，他的父親Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre36歲，母親Imania de Clifford26歲。他和Margaret Mile至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1392年在英國奧可福爾可爾索普享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Brancestre于大约1315年出生在英国奧可福爾艾普維爾时，他的父亲Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre36岁，母亲Imania de Clifford26岁。他和Margaret Mile至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1392年在英国奧可福爾可爾索普享年78岁。

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Brancestre was born about 1315, in Epwell, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre, was 36 and his mother, Imania de Clifford, was 26. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Mile. He died in 1392, in Colthorpe, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Brancestre est né environ 1315, à Epwell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Imania de Clifford, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Mile. Il est décédé en 1392, à Colthorpe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Brancestre um 1315 in Epwell, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre 36 und seine Mutter Imania de Clifford 26. Er hatte mit Margaret Mile mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1392 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Colthorpe, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Brancestre è nato il circa 1315 nel Epwell, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Imania de Clifford, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Mile. Morì nel 1392, nel Colthorpe, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Brancestreが約1315年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエプウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Adam or Alan Brancestreは36歳，母Imania de Cliffordは26歳であった。彼はMargaret Mileとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1392年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコルソルペで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Brancestre(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 스퍼드실르 p웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Imania de Clifford(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margaret Mile(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 영국 스퍼드실르 콜소에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Wheathill, Radstock, England: Wheathill, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Brancestre nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Epwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Imania de Clifford, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Mile. Ele faleceu em 1392, em Colthorpe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Brancestre родился около 1315 г. в местности эпвелл, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Imania de Clifford, 26. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Margaret Mile. Он умер в 1392 г. в местности колтаурп, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Brancestre nació aproximadamente 1315, en Epwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Adam or Alan Brancestre, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Imania de Clifford, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Margaret Mile. Murió en 1392, en Colthorpe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
